creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
Hello,
I'm agree, you can change maintainer section to me.=20

On 17.05.2013, at 5:40 =D0=CF=D3=CC=C5 =D0=CF=CC=D5=C4=CE=D1, Ruslan Makhmat=
khanov <cvs-src@yandex.ru> wrote:

> Hi Veniamin,
>=20
> would you like to grab maintainership for this port? I talked with current=
 maintainer about that at October 2012, and he told that this will depend on=
 where he will work and that he will respond in couple of weeks. Since I nev=
er got any response it make me think that maintainership of this port may be=
 transferred to you, since the all the recent updates to this port were prov=
ided by you.
>=20
> --=20
> Regards,
> Ruslan
>=20
> Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
